# Dashboard layout -- demo_report_area (spec 123 US2 fixture)

- subject_area: `demo_report_area`

One focused executive overview page answering the committed Report Intent
questions (q1, q2). Reading order: KPI strip (headline sales + volume) ->
diagnostic (sales by category).

## Page: executive_overview

- audience: branch_manager
- questions answered: q1 (headline sales + volume), q2 (transaction volume)
- sections: header, kpi_strip, diagnostic, footer_status
